title: pectis oligocephala var. affinis
intro: Pectis oligocephala var. affinis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of zexmenos or fireweed. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pectis oligocephala var. affinis include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical ointments, which are often used to treat skin irritations and other health conditions.
